Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: For their season finale, Paul and Ray tackle a remote lake adventure with a precarious beaver dam to navigate. With help from Dan and Ben, the team enjoys a day full of thrilling walleye and bass fishing. The perfect finish? A shore lunch at camp with Outdoor Flavours adding unforgettable flavor to their catch.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Remote Lake Showdown

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Capt Chris Adams, sight fish for Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon on the east coast of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Jeff Klozinski spend the day tracking down postspawn smallmouth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finding Transitional Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Venice Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The FishON! team ventures to the scenic Nagagamisis Lake, northwest of Hearst, Ontario. Joined by long-time friend Sebastian Lizotte, the day unfolds into an exhilarating fishing adventure with non-stop walleye action—over 60 catches in a single day! This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Furious Walleye Action on Nagagamisis Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Don't sleep on the summer panfish bite! The lion's share of panfishing occurs during the springtime when the fish are concentrated in the shallow waters and also in the winter, but summertime can be absolutely fantastic for bluegill and crappie. Just like other gamefish, they can make dramatic seasonal movements and you'll need to find them first before you can catch them. Today, we're joined by panfish aficionado Joel Nelson.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Fishing for Summertime Bluegill and Crappie
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew spend day two of their two and a half-day fishing trip on the El Dorado sportfishing boat out of Long Beach Sportfishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Bluefin Tuna and Yellowtail Fishing on the El Dorado, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner, Ron Dohm Jr. and Chad Ditts spend the day spotting and dropping on big Lake Michigan Lakers.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Fast Action Giant Lake Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Remote Northern Wilderness, Smallmouth Bass Fishing part 2
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe South Georgia Showdown_rd
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Tuna fishing is all about timing. Our friends from Okuma Fishing Tackle had a small window of time to come fishing with us, and the timing could not have been better. On this Stoked On Fishing adventure, we head to San Clemente Island and experience an epic day of West Coast Yellowfin fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Yellowfin Tuna Fun
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lanier Spotted Bass
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Lanier Spotted Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fall fishing on Biscotasing Lake with some of our old buddies.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In 1966, a 19-year-old, Wisconsin farm boy's life changed forever when he was drafted into the Army and shipped over to Vietnam. Now a soldier, Glenn engaged in numerous battles, and scouted for the infamous "tunnel rats" in the Vietnam War. The lone survivor in his platoon, the most heart-breaking s
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Vietnam Veteran Glenn Franks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew take a two and a half-day trip on one of our all-time favorite charter boats, the El Dorado, out of Long Beach Sportfishing. We fish on San Clemente Island and venture offshore in search of tuna.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Bluefin Tuna and Yellowtail Fishing on the El Dorado
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Ice Fishing is here! This week, we're heading north on the hunt for solid ice! We'll be meeting up with our friends from Eskimo, Bite Me Box, and Beavertail baits to catch some perch!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch

Video.summary: This week's show we're finally back on the ice and nothing better to make sure all your gear is set to go without bringing everything on about 3 inches of ice safety is everything!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | First Ice 130+ Flags in the U.P.

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | First Ice 130+ Flags in the U.P.
Larry Smith Outdoors | First Ice 130+ Flags in the U.P.

Video.summary: Jim explains how to build one of the most effective baits for bass.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.title: Episode 1
